scripts.test: node --test tests/sessionMerge.test.js tests/deckCodec.test.js tests/consensusSession.test.js tests/consensusPostGame.test.js tests/postGameScreenFollow.test.js tests/mpLaunch.test.js tests/triviaDeck.test.js tests/prepLaunch.test.js tests/prepReadyToggle.test.js tests/eveningLobby.test.js tests/hostPresence.test.js tests/tierNightLive.test.js tests/traitreSession.test.js tests/tierNightScoring.test.js tests/tierNightConsensus.test.js tests/badges.test.js tests/voteConfirm.test.js tests/playerStatsSync.test.js tests/recoveryMembership.test.js tests/syncErrorMessage.test.js tests/restartGameRollback.test.js
scripts.assets:sync: npm run assets:native && npm run cap:sync
scripts.assets:all: npm run assets:prepare && npm run assets:native && npm run cap:sync
scripts.cap:sync: npm run cap:sync-web && npx cap sync && node scripts/patchNative.mjs
